revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月三十]][[zh:二月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 30|qq=February 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. It's the last day if the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}}, or the second last day if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}}.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
As with all other day 30s of the Sino-Japanese calendar, this occurrence sometimes happens and sometimes does not, depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|733|en|733|qid=Q23570|lt=733|1=733}} {{ill|March 20|en|March 20|qid=Q2427|lt=March 20|1=March 20}}) – The "Fudoki of Izumo Province" ({{ill|Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|lt=Izumo-no-Kuni Fudoki|lt=Izumo Province Fudoki|ja|出雲国風土記|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo Province Fudoki|qq=}}) was completed (with alternative accounts). * {{ill|Jōwa|en|Jōwa|qid=Q3577279|lt=Shōwa|1=Jōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|835|en|835|qid=Q23894|lt=835|1=835}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – {{ill|Kōya-san†Kōya-san|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōya-san†Kōya-san|qq=}}’s {{ill|Kongōbu-ji|en|Kongōbu-ji|qid=Q1203429|lt=Kongōbu-ji|1=Kongōbu-ji}} was classified as a fixed-amount temple ({{ill|Teigaku-ji|ja|定額寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teigaku-ji|1=jōgaku-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11452272}}); see also the entry in the {{ill|Shoku Nihon Kōki|en|Shoku Nihon Kōki|qid=Q1041301|lt=Zoku Nihon Gokki|1=Shoku Nihon Kōki}} (entry of Shōwa 8th year, February 7). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1504|en|1504|qid=Q6148|lt=1504|1=1504}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Bunki|en|Bunki|qid=Q1324885|lt=Bunkai|1=Bunki}} to {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}}. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|qid=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}}) – In accordance with the {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|黄檗隠令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Yuanhe|en|Yuanhe|qid=Q10889567|lt=Genna|1=Yuanhe}} to {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}}. * {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1183728}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1746|en|1746|qid=Q7589|lt=1746|1=1746}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|qid=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – A great fire occurred in Edo (the Tsubouchi fire). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – The British Minister {{ill|Harry Parkes (diplomat)|en|Harry Parkes (diplomat)|qid=Q3127920|lt=Harry Parks|1=Harry Parkes (diplomat)}} was attacked by assassins {{ill|Suzaku-sō|ja|朱雀操|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzaku-sō|1=Misao Suzaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11521556}} and {{ill|Saegusa Itsumu|ja|三枝蓊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saegusa Itsumu|1=Saegusa Shigeru|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11355933}} while en route for a formal audience. == Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}} {{ill|April 8|en|April 8|qid=Q2503|lt=April 8|1=April 8}}) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Donan|ja|宇都宮遯庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Donan|1=Utsunomiya Ton'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6561283}}, a Confucian scholar (died {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707|1=1707}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1833|en|1833|qid=Q7587|lt=1833|1=1833}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|qid=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – {{ill|Mōri Motonobu|ja|毛利元承|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonobu|1=Mōri Motonobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547543}}, a daimyō of the late Edo period (head of the Seimai Domain) (died {{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}}). * Tenpō 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|April 15|en|April 15|qid=Q2497|lt=April 15|1=April 15}}) – {{ill|Miyamoto Shōichi|ja|宮本小一|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyamoto Shōichi|1=Miyamoto Koichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17215870}}, a bureaucrat and member of the House of Peers (died {{ill|1916|en|1916|qid=Q2087|lt=1916|1=1916}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|qid=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – {{ill|Katsura Shūba|ja|桂秀馬|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Shūba|1=Hidema Katsura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11709736}}, a surgeon (died {{ill|1911|en|1911|qid=Q2076|lt=1911|1=1911}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|qid=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – {{ill|Ishida Takayoshi|ja|石田孝吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishida Takayoshi|1=Kōkichi Ishida|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11586965}}, a member of the House of Representatives (died {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|681|en|681|qid=Q30342|lt=681|1=681}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – A court noble known as {{ill|Tōma Toyohama|ja|当麻豊浜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōma Toyohama|1=Toyohama Taima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17225062}} (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Katei|en|Katei|qid=Q651897|lt=Kashin|1=Katei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1236|en|1236|qid=Q5427|lt=1236|1=1236}} {{ill|April 7|en|April 7|qid=Q2505|lt=April 7|1=April 7}}) – {{ill|Hirohashi Yorimasa|ja|広橋頼資|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirohashi Yorimasa|1=Hirohashi Tsunemitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11485470}}, a kugyō (born {{ill|1182|en|1182|qid=Q19708|lt=1182|1=1182}}). * {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|qid=Q1327307|lt=Einin|1=Einin}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1294|en|1294|qid=Q5559|lt=1294|1=1294}} {{ill|March 28|en|March 28|qid=Q2458|lt=March 28|1=March 28}}) – {{ill|Hanayama In Teima|ja|花山院定雅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanayama In Teima|1=Kasannoin Sadamasa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11615288}}, a kugyō (born {{ill|1218|en|1218|qid=Q5381|lt=1218|1=1218}}). * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1495|en|1495|qid=Q6695|lt=1495|1=1495}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – {{ill|Shinsei Shōnin|en|Shinsei Shōnin|qid=Q11583420|lt=Shinsei|1=Shinsei Shōnin}}, a monk of the {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|qid=Q668188|lt=Tendai sect|1=Tiantai}} (born {{ill|1443|en|1443|qid=Q6417|lt=1443|1=1443}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1598|en|1598|qid=Q6800|lt=1598|1=1598}} {{ill|April 5|en|April 5|qid=Q2507|lt=April 5|1=April 5}}) – {{ill|Matsushita no Tsunatsuna|ja|松下之綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushita no Tsunatsuna|1=Matsushita Yukitsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11528912}}, a samurai of the Sengoku period (born {{ill|1538|en|1538|qid=Q6470|lt=1538|1=1538}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707|1=1707}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|qid=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Takarai Kikaku|en|Takarai Kikaku|qid=Q2118326|lt=Hōrai Itsukaku|1=Takarai Kikaku}} (also known as Enomoto Itsukaku), a haiku poet and one of the disciples of Shōmon Jūtetsu (born {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}}) (some sources say February 29). * {{ill|Kanpō|en|Kanpō|qid=Q1145798|lt=Kanpō|1=Kanpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1743|en|1743|qid=Q7580|lt=1743|1=1743}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Hachisuka Muneteru|en|Hachisuka Muneteru|qid=Q3125463|lt=Hachisuga Sōei|1=Hachisuka Muneteru}}, a daimyō of the Tokushima Domain (born {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1802|en|1802|qid=Q6883|lt=1802|1=1802}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|qid=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Naitō Masahana|ja|内藤政苗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naitō Masahana|1=Naitō Masamitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10514779}}, a daimyō of the Annaka Domain and Kyoho Domain (born {{ill|1741|en|1741|qid=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}}). * Tenpō 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|March 28|en|March 28|qid=Q2458|lt=March 28|1=March 28}}) – {{ill|Kohara Kimuo|ja|小原君雄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kohara Kimuo|1=Ohara Kimio|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18011576}}, a kokugaku scholar (born {{ill|1752|en|1752|qid=Q7618|lt=1752|1=1752}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Suzaku-sō|ja|朱雀操|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzaku-sō|1=Misao Suzaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11521556}}, a militant activist of the Bakumatsu period (birth year unknown). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|29|3|1|1|30|3|2|0230|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月三十]]
{{translated page|ja|2月30日 (旧暦)|version=102552324|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 30 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 30일]] [[ja:2月30日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月三十]]
[[ar:February 30 (Lunisolar)]]
